tools.name: seo_audit_page
tools.description:
Use this when you need to analyze a webpage's on-page SEO health. Returns a structured JSON audit with score 0-100 and prioritized recommendations.

1. score (number 0-100) -- overall SEO health score
2. title -- tag content, length, keyword presence
3. metaDescription -- content, length, truncation

tools.name: seo_audit_batch
tools.description:
Use this when you need to compare SEO health across multiple pages at once (up to 10 URLs). Returns the same full audit as seo_audit_page for each URL in a single call.

1. results (array) -- each entry contains the full SEO audit (score, title, meta, headings, links, images, schema, issues)
2. summ
